Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server

Class Server

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.Server
public class Server extends Object
The Server class manages communication between clients and game instances through both socket and RMI connections. It handles message processing, client connections, and message distribution among clients.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Server()
    Constructor for the Server class.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addHandler(Integer clientID, Handler handler)
    Adds a client handler to the handlers map.

    Retrieves and increments the client counter for assigning client IDs.

    Reads messages from the queue and processes them using the Lobby.

    Starts the socket server to accept incoming client connections.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Server

      public Server()
      Constructor for the Server class. Initializes the GameManager, Lobby, message queue, and various data structures. Starts both RMI and socket servers.

  • Method Details

    • readQueue

      public void readQueue()
      Reads messages from the queue and processes them using the Lobby.

    • setHandlersAndInstance

      public void setHandlersAndInstance(GameServerInstance gameInstance, int clientID, String nickname)
      This method links the client's handler to the specific game instance they are part of.
      Parameters:
      gameInstance - The GameServerInstance to associate the handler with.
      clientID - The client's ID.
      nickname - The client's nickname.

    • sendResponse

      public void sendResponse(ServerToClientMessage m)
      Sends a response message to clients based on the recipient client ID. If clientID is -10, broadcasts the message to all clients.
      Parameters:
      m - The ServerToClientMessage to send.

    • addToQueue

      public void addToQueue(Message message)
      Adds a message to the server's message queue for processing.
      Parameters:
      message - The Message to add to the queue.

    • getClientsCounter

      public int getClientsCounter()
      Retrieves and increments the client counter for assigning client IDs.
      Returns:
      The current client counter value.

    • addHandler

      public void addHandler(Integer clientID, Handler handler)
      Adds a client handler to the handlers map.
      Parameters:
      clientID - The client's ID.
      handler - The Handler instance for the client.

    • startSocketServer

      public void startSocketServer()
      Starts the socket server to accept incoming client connections. Uses an ExecutorService for handling multiple client connections concurrently.

    • addUnistancedHandler

      public void addUnistancedHandler(int clientID, AbstractHandler h)
      Adds an AbstractHandler instance to the unistancedHandlers map. This method is used to temporarily store handlers before linking them to game instances.
      Parameters:
      clientID - The client's ID.
      h - The AbstractHandler instance.
